name: Security Group
description: AWS Security Group for network access control

inputs.name: description
inputs.label: Description
inputs.placeholder: Allow inbound traffic for web server
inputs.description: Description of the security group (cannot be changed after creation)

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.label: VPC ID
inputs.description: VPC where the security group will be created

inputs.name: use_name_prefix
inputs.label: Use Name Prefix
inputs.description: Use the name as a prefix (adds random suffix) to avoid naming conflicts

inputs.name: revoke_rules_on_delete
inputs.label: Revoke Rules on Delete
inputs.description: Revoke all ingress/egress rules before deleting to avoid dependency errors

inputs.name: ingress_with_source_security_group_id
inputs.label: Inbound Rules from Security Groups (JSON)
inputs.description: Inbound rules that reference another security group as the source

inputs.name: egress_with_source_security_group_id
inputs.label: Outbound Rules to Security Groups (JSON)
inputs.description: Outbound rules that reference another security group as the destination

inputs.name: ingress_cidr_blocks
inputs.label: Default Ingress CIDR Blocks
inputs.description: Comma-separated default CIDR blocks applied to predefined ingress rules (ingress_rules field)

inputs.name: egress_cidr_blocks
inputs.label: Default Egress CIDR Blocks
inputs.description: Comma-separated default CIDR blocks applied to predefined egress rules
